creator: ktullavik@gmail.com
text:
print/acroread9 can't start without linux-libxml2 installed.
I think linux-gdk-pixbuf is also needed.

Still (with or without linux-gdk-pixbuf), acroread crashes few seconds after startup. Everyting except terminal output seems normal until it crashes (pdf document is displayed for a few seconds...).


# acroread
(acroread:48994): GdkPixbuf-WARNING **: Cannot open pixbuf loader module file '/etc/gtk-2.0/gdk-pixbuf.loaders': No such file or directory

Patch attached with submission follows:
